articles.author: Cheyenne Ubiera
articles.title: Scientists' plan to halt rare El Niño heatwave may trigger something unstoppable - The Mirror US
articles.description: Scientists at the Scripps Institution of Oceanography have revealed a controversial geoengineering technique that could stop a potentially devastating Super El Niño, but it may hold even greater risks
articles.content:
Scientists have divised a plan to stop a Super El Nio, but it could have disastrous consequences(Image: NOAA)
